source: Finding Thousands of Arbitrage Products...Store-Front Stalking.txt @00:10:14.000 — Sweet Baby Ray's, only ~30 sales/mo (below our 50 floor) but strong $6.14/unit profit at 3 sellers; narrator bought anyway ('six dollars profit every time'). DIVERGENCE NOTE: sales is a SCORED check (partial credit at 30/50), not a hard gate, so it's plausible this still clears review — real test of whether the scorer's partial-credit design matches practitioner tolerance for under-threshold-but-profitable volume.
